data.content: Planning complete. Cover the acceptance field end to end across Rust and foolery: schema/data model, queued write path (`src/cli.rs`, `src/write_queue.rs`, `src/write_dispatch.rs`, `CreateKnotOptions/create_knot_with_options`), new `knot.acceptance_set` event with rehydration and sync handling, prompt plus human-readable show rendering, and foolery CLI/backend migration off the acceptance-note shim. Keep acceptance independent of description/body. No new child knots required; fold `src/ui.rs` into child `93c9` and use `28b1` for round-trip/coverage tests in both repos.
